Off Calendar Sep-30-2025 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Mar-25-2025 Granted Per Written Order

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Feb-25-2025 Continued To Mar-25-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Aug-21-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

This matter was put on for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will. No one appeared to object. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated August 11, 2020 is admitted to probate. Robert Grenon is appointed as the Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond is not required. Order for the same signed in open Court. A status hearing for filing of a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration is set for September 30, 2025, at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. If either petition is filed two weeks prior, the status hearing will go off calendar. Isidoor Bornstein is appointed probate referee.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Magdaleno. Not reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jul-23-2024 Continued To Aug-21-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
